title: Fix data persistence for admin: ensure all create/update/delete operations save correctly to the canister

requirements.text: Fix the backend Motoko actor so that all write operations (addStudent, updateStudent, deleteStudent, addAccount, updateAccount, deleteAccount, addTransaction, addBankDetail, updateBankDetail, deleteBankDetail) correctly persist data to stable storage and survive canister upgrades. Ensure no write is silently dropped or lost.

quotes: admin लॉगीन केल्यावर admin लॉगीन मधून माहिती save व्हावी

acceptanceCriteria: After admin logs in and adds a student, the student record appears in getAllStudents immediately and after a page refresh.
After admin adds an account, the account record persists in getAllAccounts after page refresh.
After admin submits a transaction, the transaction is retrievable via getTransactionsByAccount after page refresh.
After admin adds/edits/deletes a bank detail, the change persists in getAllBankDetails after page refresh.
All stable variables in main.mo are declared with the 'stable' keyword so data survives canister upgrades.

requirements.text: Fix the frontend mutation hooks in useQueries.ts to use an authenticated actor (not anonymous) when the admin is logged in. Each mutation must call the correct backend update method, await the response, handle any returned error variants, and invalidate the relevant React Query cache on success so the UI reflects persisted data without a manual refresh.

quotes: admin लॉगीन केल्यावर admin लॉगीन मधून माहिती save व्हावी

acceptanceCriteria: The actor used inside every useMutation call is the authenticated actor from useActor, not a default anonymous actor.
Submitting the Student form as admin saves the record and the Student table updates without a manual page refresh.
Submitting the Account form as admin saves the record and the Account table updates without a manual page refresh.
Submitting the Transaction form as admin saves the record and the Transaction table updates without a manual page refresh.
Adding/editing/deleting a Bank Detail as admin persists and the Bank Details table updates without a manual page refresh.
No silent failures — if a backend call returns an error, a user-visible error message is shown.

requirements.text: Ensure the useActor hook correctly initialises and returns an authenticated actor whenever the admin session is active in localStorage, so that canister update calls made after admin login are signed with a valid identity and not rejected by the backend's role-based access control.

quotes: admin लॉगीन केल्यावर admin लॉगीन मधून माहिती save व्हावी

acceptanceCriteria: When admin is logged in (session present in localStorage), the actor returned by useActor is authenticated and can successfully call update methods on the canister.
When no session is present (logged out), an anonymous actor is used for read-only query calls.
Actor identity is refreshed/invalidated when the session changes (login or logout).

constraints: Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui).
All backend logic must remain in the single actor in backend/main.mo.
Only generate migration.mo if stable storage schema changes require it.
nonGoals: Changing the visual design or color theme.
Adding new pages or navigation items.
Modifying the login credential logic (admin/admin or account-number-based user login).
Any third-party integrations (Google Sheets, email, etc.).
